commands.author: scotthuang
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A maintainer should decide the uninstall data-deletion policy before repair because the current patch changes destructive installer behavior.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a destructive installer cleanup rule that needs scoping before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Avoid recursively deleting the selected install directory — installer.iss:115 (sha=f6e19533a91aea7a37cdec7b7ceafe640bd06dc5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR fixes Inno `AppId` escaping, adds a short uninstall delay, adds recursive app-directory cleanup, and pins those installer contracts with structural tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source: installing to a custom or existing `{app}` directory and then uninstalling would run the new recursive `filesandordirs` deletion. I did not run a Windows installer smoke in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer should decide the uninstall data-deletion policy before repair because the current patch changes destructive installer behavior.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
